report.title: Shared locations list with all attributes
report.description: A list for locations set up by one but used by another. Includes a list of all attributes.
report.query: SELECT #columns# FROM locations l JOIN locations_websites lw ON lw.location_id=l.id AND lw.deleted=false AND lw.website_id=118 WHERE l.deleted=false AND (l.location_type_id=#location_type_id# OR #location_type_id#=0) AND (l.parent_id=#parent_id# OR #parent_id#=0) #order_by#

param.name: location_type_id
param.description: The location type id, or leave blank to not filter by location type.

param.name: parent_id
param.description: The parent location id, or leave blank to not filter by parent location

column.name: locattrs
column.sql: coalesce( (select json_agg(attrs) from ( select llav.location_attribute_id as attribute_id, llav.id as value_id, llav.caption, la.data_type, la.multi_value, llav.value, llav.raw_value, llav.upper_value from list_location_attribute_values llav join location_attributes la on la.id = llav.location_attribute_id and la.deleted = false where llav.location_id = l.id ) attrs), '[]'::json )
